import json
with open\('ML2.ipynb', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    nb = json.load\(f\)
print\('Total cells:', len\(nb['cells']\)\)
print\('\\n=== CELL OVERVIEW ==='\)
for i, cell in enumerate\(nb['cells'][:50]\):
    cell_type = cell.get\('cell_type', 'unknown'\)
    if cell_type == 'markdown':
        source = ''.join\(cell.get\('source', []\)\)[:70].replace\('\\n', ' '\)
        print\(f"{i:2d}. MARKDOWN: {source}"\)
    elif cell_type == 'code':
        source = ''.join\(cell.get\('source', []\)\)[:70].replace\('\\n', ' '\)
        print\(f"{i:2d}. CODE: {source}"\)
PYEOF)

Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\Lakip\\PycharmProjects\\VSE" && python << 'PYEOF'
import json
import re

with open\('ML2.ipynb', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    nb = json.load\(f\)

print\("=== PROJECT STRUCTURE OVERVIEW ===\\n"\)
print\("MARKDOWN SECTIONS:"\)
for i, cell in enumerate\(nb['cells']\):
    if cell.get\('cell_type'\) == 'markdown':
        source = ''.join\(cell.get\('source', []\)\)
        # Extract headers
        for line in source.split\('\\n'\):
            if line.startswith\('#'\):
                print\(f"  {line.strip\(\)}"\)

print\("\\n\\nCODE CELLS SUMMARY:"\)
for i, cell in enumerate\(nb['cells']\):
    if cell.get\('cell_type'\) == 'code':
        source = ''.join\(cell.get\('source', []\)\)
        # Get first meaningful line
        lines = [l.strip\(\) for l in source.split\('\\n'\) if l.strip\(\) and not l.strip\(\).startswith\('#'\)]
        if lines:
            first_line = lines[0][:80]
            print\(f"  Cell {i}: {first_line}"\)
PYEOF)

Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\Lakip\\PycharmProjects\\VSE" && python << 'PYEOF'
import json
with open\('ML2.ipynb', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    nb = json.load\(f\)

print\("=== COMPLETE PROJECT STRUCTURE ===\\n"\)
for i, cell in enumerate\(nb['cells']\):
    if cell.get\('cell_type'\) == 'markdown':
        source = ''.join\(cell.get\('source', []\)\)
        for line in source.split\('\\n'\):
            if line.startswith\('#'\):
                level = len\(line\) - len\(line.lstrip\('#'\)\)
                indent = "  " * \(level - 1\)
                title = line.lstrip\('#'\).strip\(\)
                print\(f"{indent}{title}"\)
PYEOF)

Bash(python -c "
import nbformat
from nbconvert import HTMLExporter
import io

with open\('ML2.ipynb', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    nb = nbformat.read\(f, as_version=4\)

exporter = HTMLExporter\(\)
body, _ = exporter.from_notebook_node\(nb\)

with open\('ML2.html', 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    f.write\(body\)
print\('HTML exported, size:', len\(body\)\)
" 2>&1)
